agents.name: Rex
agents.note: Session 191 SHIPPED US-309 passes:true (battery_health recorder optional SocPct kwargs, BL-013 Option A Step 1). Sprint 28 NOW COMPLETE: 5 stories passes:true (US-304/306/307/308/309) + 1 wontfix (US-305 per BL-011 Option A). FIX: BatteryHealthRecorder.startDrainEvent + endDrainEvent each gain optional keyword-only `startSocPct: int | None = None` / `endSocPct: int | None = None` AFTER existing kwargs. Pattern: `startSocColumn = float(startSocPct) if startSocPct is not None else startVcell` -- when kwarg None (current 4 production callers in orchestrator.py:862/893/917/933), the legacy start_soc / end_soc columns dual-write VCELL bit-for-bit (US-289 contract preserved); when kwarg set, the legacy columns finally hold actual SOC% (0-100) while start_vcell_v / end_vcell_v always carry VCELL voltage. DrainEventCloseResult.endSoc returns endSocColumn so re-reads from DB on close-once stay coherent. Tests: 4 new in test_battery_health_recorder_socpct_seam.py (2 classes: TestStartDrainEventSocPctSeam + TestEndDrainEventSocPctSeam); pre-fix 2/4 RED with `TypeError: unexpected keyword argument 'startSocPct'` and the symmetric endSocPct case, 2/4 GREEN proving back-compat baseline; post-fix 4/4 GREEN. 33/33 across new + existing recorder + dual-write lock-down tests. 169/169 across battery_health-adjacent + integration + server sync. Ruff clean. sprint_lint clean (0 err / 0 warn / 6 stories). Fast suite GREEN exit code 0. SEAM-NOT-WIRED ACKNOWLEDGED: Step 1 alone is structurally complete + behaviorally inert at production callers -- the documented + CIO-approved no-band-aid pattern. B-060 (V0.27.3+) wires UpsMonitor.getBatteryPercentage() through orchestrator; B-061 (V0.28.0+) drops legacy start_soc / end_soc columns once Spool's analytics consumers migrate. Mirrors US-289 deprecation pattern (Sprint 25). REUSABLE PATTERN: ternary-default-on-optional-kwarg = canonical inert-seam shape. `column_value = float(kwarg) if kwarg is not None else legacy_value` preserves bit-for-bit back-compat (lock-down tests stay GREEN) while landing future API surface. When kwarg=None, `column_value == legacy_value` exactly, so any test asserting `result.field == legacy_input` still passes. EMITTING <promise>COMPLETE</promise> -- all sprint work resolved (5 passes:true + 1 PM-resolved wontfix); US-305's wontfix is Marcus's already-applied BL-011 Option A disposition, no further work remains.

agents.name: Agent2
agents.note: Sprint 25 / Session 158 -- US-286 SHIPPED passes:true. tests/pi/integration/test_engine_drive_capture_e2e.py (1 class / 1 test / 7 phases): real ApplicationOrchestrator + DriveDetector + SummaryRecorder + ObdDataLogger; mock surface = connection.obd.query (BT edge) only; 0.16s call duration vs 30-sec budget. Mirrors US-260 cold-start pattern. Discriminator: would FAIL against May-4-5 production regression class (DriveDetector never operational) + against any silent realtime_data write regression. Two gotchas surfaced for future tests: (1) e2e fixtures must seed profiles('daily') because realtime_data has FK + bare orchestrator doesn't run ProfileManager; (2) production order query->logReading->_handleReading means first N ticks land with drive_id NULL -- query realtime_data without drive_id filter. Standing by post-US-286.
